result:
**Goal: Add RLE pattern import so users can load any pattern from the massive online Game of Life pattern libraries.**

RLE (Run Length Encoded) is the standard file format used by LifeWiki and virtually every Game of Life archive. Supporting it would unlock access to thousands of well-known patterns (spaceships, guns, breeders, methuselahs, etc.) via a simple `L` key to load a `.rle` file from disk. This is the single highest-leverage feature missing from an otherwise impressively complete simulator.
